ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "licence_number" INTEGER /* Licence number associated with the well */,
  "mineral_rights" TEXT /* Mineral rights status */,
  "ground_elevation" REAL /* Ground elevation of the well */,
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the well */,
  "surface_coordinates" TEXT /* Surface coordinates of the well */,
  "board_field_centre" TEXT /* Board field centre associated with the well */,
  "projected_depth" REAL /* Projected depth of the well */,
  "drilling_operation" TEXT /* Type of drilling operation */,
  "well_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the well */,
  "well_type" TEXT /* Type of the well */,
  "substance" TEXT /* Substance being targeted */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded information */,
  "lahee_classification" TEXT /* LAHEE classification of the well */,
  "field" TEXT /* Field in which the well is located */,
  "terminating_zone" TEXT /* Terminating zone of the well */,
  "licensee" TEXT /* Licensee responsible for the well */,
  "surface_location" TEXT /* Surface location of the well */,
  "convdf" INTEGER /* Conversion code for the well */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the well */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the well */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the well record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the well record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the well record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the well record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the well (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_convdf FOREIGN KEY ("convdf") REFERENCES tracking_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_field FOREIGN KEY ("field") REFERENCES fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_drilling_operation FOREIGN KEY ("drilling_operation") REFERENCES drilling_operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_licensee FOREIGN KEY ("licensee") REFERENCES licensees ("licensee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_well_purpose FOREIGN KEY ("well_purpose") REFERENCES well_purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_longitude FOREIGN KEY ("longitude") REFERENCES coordinates ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_lahee_classification FOREIGN KEY ("lahee_classification") REFERENCES lahee_classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_mineral_rights FOREIGN KEY ("mineral_rights") REFERENCES mineral_rights ("mineral_rights_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_surface_location FOREIGN KEY ("surface_location") REFERENCES surface_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_latitude FOREIGN KEY ("latitude") REFERENCES coordinates ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_substance FOREIGN KEY ("substance") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_terminating_zone FOREIGN KEY ("terminating_zone") REFERENCES terminating_zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_well_type FOREIGN KEY ("well_type") REFERENCES well_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mineral_rights" (
  "mineral_rights_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mineral rights status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the mineral rights */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mineral rights status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mineral_rights_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drilling_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drilling operation type */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of drilling operation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drilling operation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well purpose */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the well */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well type */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the well */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the substance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the substance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lahee_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LAHEE classification */,
  "classification" TEXT /* LAHEE classification of the well */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the LAHEE classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terminating_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terminating zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the terminating zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the terminating zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licensees" (
  "licensee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each licensee */,
  "licensee_name" TEXT /* Name of the licensee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the licensee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("licensee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surface_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surface location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Surface location of the well */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the surface location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking code */,
  "ats" INTEGER /* ATS code for the well */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number for the well */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for the well */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the well */,
  "convdf" INTEGER /* Conversion code for the well */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tracking code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of coordinates */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the well */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the well */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coordinates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well on which the operation is performed */,
  "operation_date" TEXT /* Date of the operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_operations_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well producing */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "production_volume" REAL /* Volume of production */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance produced */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_production_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_production_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the well */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_status_history_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the well */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date of the note */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_notes_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)
column_names: Licence number associated with the well
Board field centre associated with the well

Date when the well record was last updated

Description of the drilling operation type

Unique identifier for each terminating zone

Unique identifier for each tracking code

Unique identifier for each status change
